title: stelis clusaris
intro: Stelis clusaris, also known as the orchid tree, is a plant species in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic activities. The health benefits of Stelis clusaris include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Stelis clusaris can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or by making a tincture with the plant's roots and stems.
